story.title: Our Story
story.desc_1: Liquid Digital is a leading crypto fund in investment and trading in primary and secondary markets, with a focus on liquidity provision, liquidity management, and strategic exits.
story.desc_2: Since its establishment in 2016, Liquid Digital has successively invested in more than 300 enterprises. With a highly professional global team and unique industrial resource advantages,Liquid Digital is dedicated to delivering exceptional liquidity services, aiming to support the project in enhancing its long-term value and ecological investment throughout the life cycle.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc_1: We yearn to be prosperous for more than 88 years, to invest in and serve more than 500 killer projects, and to emerge as a global leading investor with over US$100 billion crypto assets under management.
vision.desc_2: We seek to create positive impact and sustainable value around the globe by offering life-cycle solutions via diverse strategies for a range of market opportunities and competent infrastructure support.

cultur.title: Cultur
cultur.desc: Client First, Play as a team, exercise prudence and integrity, uphold openness and transparency.

feature.title: Edge
feature.desc_1: Top token HODL and lead investor in many cases
feature.desc_2: Leading Liquidity Provider and Market Maker
feature.desc_3: Wide deal resourcing channels with global/local VC partners in Asia, EU, US
feature.desc_4: Strategic partnership with crypto media and exchanges
feature.desc_5: Global meet-up host for LD Portfolio and sponsor of Hackathon
feature.desc_6: Key players in top crypto projects

team.desc_1: We provide our clients with one-stop comprehensive liquidity solutions. If you have a vision, please contact to our team.

bankTrading.title: Investment Banks Trading
bankTrading.desc_1: Provide customized Liquidity trading services for clients
